scope: Full kitchen restoration after flood event. Premium finish upgrade on cabinetry and benchtop.

lineItems.description: Make safe and emergency water extraction (after-hours)
Strip-out of damaged kitchen cabinetry and disposal
Structural drying — 6 days, 4 dehumidifiers + air movers
New stone benchtop (upgrade — not in original spec)
Replace 9 m² engineered timber flooring (kitchen + adjoining hall)
Replace damaged gyprock to wet wall (4 m²) and repaint
Plumbing — replace flexible hose, isolation valves, pressure test

notes: Premium upgrade quote. Includes stone benchtop replacement and 2-pac cabinetry. Customer indicated preference for upgraded finish at owner cost.
